title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 6
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear woman and man talking about the art club.
items.audio_script: Woman: Hi, Lucy. I’m checking the plan for the art club. I thought we were going to meet in the library, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Man: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]The art club is in the science room this week[/1]. || Woman: Good thing I asked. I nearly sat in the quiet area. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Man: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Hi, Lucy. I’m checking the plan for the art club. I thought we were going to meet in the library, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. The art club is in the science room this week.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly sat in the quiet area. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.question: Where is the art club this week?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, school library tables, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, science classroom with sinks, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, art room with paint pots, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “The art club is in the science room this week.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear man and woman talking about the swimming lesson.
items.audio_script: Man: Hi, Jack. I’m checking the plan for the swimming lesson. [1]You need a towel today because the pool has none to borrow[/1]. || Man: Good thing I asked. I nearly looked for my old goggles. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Woman: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.context: You hear boy and girl talking about the train.
